name: mild_all_day_nat_vent_only
description: All-day mild conditions: outdoor stays 65-70F, always below indoor 72-74F. Mild classification sets hvac_mode=off. Windows open mid-morning and nat vent runs all day without exiting. No heating or AC fires at any point.
notes: Covers the 'all-nat-vent day' pattern: outdoor below indoor all day within the comfort band.
No HVAC mode fires — pure free cooling via natural ventilation.
Outdoor never approaches threshold (comfort_cool + delta = 74 + 3 = 77F) so nat vent stays active.
Indoor stays in the 70-74F comfort band throughout.
This is the ideal spring/fall day scenario where CA does minimal work.

events.note: Morning: indoor 72F, outdoor 65F — outdoor well below indoor, comfort band maintained.
Mild classification: hvac_mode=off, windows_recommended=false so sensor_open events are processed by the nat-vent eligibility check rather than the planned-window gate.
User opens window at 8 AM. outdoor=65F < indoor=72F, indoor=72F > comfort_heat=70F, outdoor=65F <= threshold 77F — nat vent activates.
Midday: outdoor warmed slightly to 68F but still below indoor 73F. Nat vent continues.
Afternoon peak: indoor at comfort_cool=74F, outdoor 70F still below. Nat vent holds.
Evening: both temperatures drifting back down. Nat vent still active.

assertions.reason: Mild-day classification applied: hvac_mode=off. Indoor=72F is above comfort_heat=70F.
sensor_open: outdoor=65F < indoor=72F, indoor=72F > comfort_heat=70F, outdoor=65F <= threshold 74+3=77F — nat vent activates.
temp_update: outdoor=68F < indoor=73F — nat vent exit conditions not met; nat vent continues. Most recent decision is still natural_ventilation.
Afternoon peak: outdoor=70F still below indoor=74F, still below threshold 77F — nat vent continues uninterrupted.
Evening: outdoor=65F < indoor=72.5F — nat vent persists all day, no HVAC fired.

verdict.summary: All-day mild conditions sustain natural ventilation without any HVAC firing
verdict.observed_behavior: classification_applied (off) → natural_ventilation on window open → nat vent sustained through midday and afternoon peak
verdict.expected_behavior: HVAC off all day; pure free cooling via nat vent when outdoor < indoor throughout comfort band
